'''Memcha-Badawzi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] and daughter of the infamous [[Socorran]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Abdi-Badawzi]].

Memcha was a gangster and ran the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Cordel Cove]] on [[Neftali/Legends|Neftali]].
